description: Delete obsolete drag-drop components and legacy interactive builders replaced by Families A-U, refactor chart components, and rebuild 8 core simulations on the practice.v1 contract.
deviation_notes: Phase 1: Deleted 11 obsolete components and 10 test files. Phase 2: Fixed BreakEvenChart prop/state sync bug, FinancialDashboard currency formatting, added charts barrel export and chart-types unit tests. Phase 3: Rebuilt 8 simulations with practice.v1 envelope emission. Phase 4: Verified clean codebase, fixed build by making @cloudflare/vite-plugin optional, passed lint/test/build.
